title: How Chinese, Russian Arctic ambitions are fueling a U.S. polar icebreaker mission
summary_full: China and Russia have a big lead in efforts to control once impenetrable Arctic waters. The U.S. is spending billions on new icebreakers in a race to catch up.
summary_public: China and Russia have a big lead in efforts to control once impenetrable Arctic waters. The U.S. is spending billions on new icebreakers in a race to catch up.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russian Arctic ambitions are fueling a U.S. polar icebreaker mission
